race.comment: AUSSIE ADAPTOR (8) began awkwardly then warmed to the task late to get up for fourth last start over 1200m at Mornington. Drops 3.5kgs in this tougher race. Looking for this trip now so in an even contest he looks a genuine hope. NEEDAWINNA (9) went to Canberra last time out and ran her usual honest race, beaten a long neck over 1200m after racing up on the speed. On trial at this distance but confident she will run it right out. FREAK OF NATURE (7) backs up seven days after looking a chance but tiring late over 1400m at Seymour. Good enough to test this line-up if he brings his best form to the table. FOURTHTIMELUCKY (5) has a wide alley to contend which doesn't help the cause. Not a regular in the winner's circle but he rarely far off them so a good exotics inclusion. OLLANDIA BEACH (2) resumes. Came of age last prep and a bright return is expected.
